prompt: Risk premium cue: tap right hole card (Ks).
why_v1: Hole-card anchor keeps hand reference stable before tournament-pressure action.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. Ks is the hole-card anchor, so the tournament read stays tied to the high-card cue that keeps the hand's pressure balance honest.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. The king of spades is the target hole card because that blocker cue is part of the risk-premium read before the final action.
